arts.ttl: Tomas Cosgrove gives Larne historic Conference League win over Gent
arts.sum: Larne are the first club from Northern Ireland to make it to the group stage of a European competition.

arts.ttl: Jorthy Mokio: Ajax beat out Barca and Bayern Munich to sign Gent wonderkid
arts.sum: The time of the Golden Generation in Belgium around Eden Hazard (33), Kevin de Bruyne (33), and Romelu Lukaku (31) is coming to an end, but the next group of top talents is ready to...
